name: fh360-automation
description: FH360 Enterprise Automation Framework — Playwright + Cucumber BDD + Allure

scripts.bdd: npx cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require step-definitions/**/*.steps.ts --require fixtures/**/*.ts features/**/*.feature
scripts.bdd:smoke: npx cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require step-definitions/**/*.steps.ts --require fixtures/**/*.ts --tags @smoke features/**/*.feature
scripts.bdd:regression: npx cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require step-definitions/**/*.steps.ts --require fixtures/**/*.ts --tags @regression features/**/*.feature
scripts.report:allure: npx allure generate reports/allure-results --clean -o reports/allure-report && npx allure open reports/allure-report

author: FHN - Playwright Team
